name: Shadow Drift - Malformed Reviewer Payload Leak
failure_mode: A fallback summary path starts surfacing malformed reviewer fragments inside Day 7 audit evidence while the primary refusal path still appears online.
detection: Use Day 7 telemetry and audit artifacts only. The downstream signal is a correlation-linked leak in refusal evidence, not an explicit earlier-day banner.
remediation: 1. Trace the leaking summary through Day 7 evidence. 2. Patch the current-day guardrail or audit shaping surface. 3. Re-run the enforced Day 7 evidence path.
